commands.summary: Focused self-model registry, invariant, lifecycle, projection, and CLI tests passed with 175 tests.
The full repository test suite passed with 521 tests.
The committed SELF_MODEL.json matched a normalized rebuild and the audit returned ok true.

Confirmed that CAP-0010 and completed PLAN-20260710-0004 provide the parametric registry, reference and lifecycle integrity, fixture and production invariants, normalized relations, projection-drift enforcement, validated local record CLI, and documentation identified as missing by GAP-0003.
Confirmed zero unresolved references and a green self-model registry audit.

summary: Verified that the deficiency described by GAP-0003 has been resolved. CAP-0010 and completed PLAN-20260710-0004 provide a read-only parametric registry over canonical JSON records, registry-backed projection generation, reference and lifecycle integrity, independent fixture and production invariants, normalized diagnostic relations, projection-drift enforcement, a validated collision-safe local record CLI, and developer documentation. Focused tests, the complete suite, and self-model audits pass.
